Not applicable Not applicable Not applicable Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section 6 (Control and Instrumentation Works) 6 - 69 6.4.5 Vibration Monitoring System i) Microprocessor based vibration monitoring system shall be provided for ID fans, FD fans, PA fans, CEPs , BFPs ,and all other pumps/ fans operating on 3.3kv/11kV.The number of bearing loca tions to be monitored on each fan/ pump shall be as per requirements fina lized during detailed engineering but not less than 2 bearing locations for each fan/pump
